candidate: L1 INDEX-REBALANCE event study (BIST100/BIST30 add/delete) -- pit_membership effective-date flips, market-adjusted CAR
hypothesis: BIST index reconstitution produces abnormal returns around the effective date (index-inclusion/exclusion effect). Additions run up into the effective day and may reverse afterward; deletions mirror. Tradeable read requires a post-effective look-ahead-safe window.

event_definition.addition: prev=False -> curr=True on a symbol's in_INDEX series (first date new status holds); prev must be non-NaN (no birth-of-panel artifacts)
event_definition.tau0: the flip date = EFFECTIVE date in our panel (clusters on quarter starts Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct 1 = BIST review effective days). Announcement is ~2 weeks earlier (NOT in panel).

expected_counts.note: 2020-01-02 has a 23/23 cluster (large reconstitution / source change) -- KEPT, not excluded (exclusion would be p-hacking); flagged in report.

abnormal_return: AR_t = r_i,t - r_mkt,t ; r_i = clipped daily simple return (adjusted_close, +/-10% clip via clip_clean_returns); r_mkt = equal-weight daily return of FULL eligible universe (ew_full daily, honest bar). CAR(window) = sum of AR over the window's trading days, aligned to each event's tau0 index in its own return series.

windows.tradeable_note: ONLY [+1,+K] is look-ahead-safe/tradeable: flip observed at tau0 (effective date), position entered at tau0+1 close. Pre-windows require knowing the event in advance (announcement date NOT in data) -> DESCRIPTIVE only.

statistics.per_event_t: mean CAR / (std / sqrt(N_events)) -- naive, treats events independent
statistics.date_clustered_t: PRIMARY: collapse events to one mean-CAR per effective-date (~32 dates), t-stat across event-dates -- conservative for same-date market-shock correlation (Bildik-Gulay style)
statistics.nw_lags: reuse cfg.D203_NW_LAGS (3) ONLY on the date-collapsed series ordered in time
statistics.ci: reuse _mean_ci block-bootstrap on per-event CAR for reporting

liquidity.liquid_def: trailing-63d-median value_tl >= 1.0e7 TL at tau0 (D-205 absolute threshold). Index members are generally liquid so LIQUID ~= ALL for BIST100; reported honestly anyway.

cost.model: D-207 per-stock realistic round-trip (quoted-primary, Roll fallback, tier). ONE round-trip per event for the [+1,+K] tradeable read (enter +1, exit +K) -> very low turnover.

regime_split.require: sign-stable both halves for a tradeable verdict

honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.summary: Agent graded index-inclusion MODERATE but globally DECAYING. Bildik-Gulay 2008 (BIST): VOLUME effect > PRICE effect; price effect peaks ON the effective day then partially REVERSES.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.pre_window_adds: likely POSITIVE run-up (-10..-1) -- index-fund front-running -- but DESCRIPTIVE (not cleanly tradeable without announcement date).
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.post_window_adds: likely FLAT-to-NEGATIVE (reversal) -- so the look-ahead-safe tradeable long window probably does NOT offer a positive long edge for additions; a weak long-deletion / short-addition mean-reversion is plausible.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.most_likely_verdict: DESCRIPTIVE-VIEW (pre-effective index-effect real but not tradeable) + tradeable-window NOT a deployable long edge. Possible weak post-effective reversal. NOT expecting a clean deployable edge. Thin event count (~250 adds across ~32 dates) -> significance-wall risk high.
honest_expectation_DECLARED_BEFORE_RESUL.celebration: NONE. Cheap, closes a gap, highest-novelty with data-in-hand. Result recorded whatever it is.

keep_bar_FROZEN.definition: TRADEABLE-aday requires, on the LIQUID universe, a look-ahead-safe [+1,+K] window with ALL of: (1) |net CAR after realistic round-trip cost| > 0 in a deployable direction, (2) date-clustered |t| >= 2.0, (3) regime sign-stable (2022-01 split, same sign both halves), (4) a coherent long-only-deployable direction (long-adds OR long-deletes; a long/short add-minus-del spread is noted but not long-only-deployable).
keep_bar_FROZEN.else: VIEW (index-effect documented, descriptive) OR significance/cost-wall -> archived. No 2nd round / no grid-sweep (p-hacking forbidden).
